data.title: COSCO SHIPPING Orders 12 New Vessels in RMB16.8 Billion Fleet Expansion
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from COSCO SHIPPING Holdings Co ( (HK:1919) ) is now available.

COSCO SHIPPING Holdings has commissioned the construction of 12 new vessels through its wholly owned subsidiary COSCO Asset Management, signing shipbuilding contracts with Jiangnan Shipyard and China Shipbuilding Trading worth a total of RMB16.79 billion. The ships, to be delivered between 2028 and 2029, will be financed by up to 60% external debt or bank loans with the balance from internal resources, and the contracts include detailed progress-based payment schedules, liquidated damages for delivery delays and technical underperformance, and refund protections in case of termination, underscoring the group’s continued fleet expansion and disciplined capital management under Hong Kong’s disclosable transaction rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1919) stock is a Sell with a HK$10.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on COSCO SHIPPING Holdings Co stock, see the HK:1919 Stock Forecast page.

data.title: TransThera Sciences to Raise HK$190 Million via Discounted H-Share Placement
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing). Inc. ( (HK:2617) ) has shared an update.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. has entered into a placing agreement with a sole placing agent to issue 2.1 million new H shares at HK$92.85 per share, representing about 0.7% of its existing H share capital and 0.53% of total issued shares. The placing price reflects a discount of around 18% to recent market prices and is expected to raise gross proceeds of approximately HK$194.99 million (net HK$190.14 million), with the new shares issued under the company’s existing general mandate and requiring no additional shareholder approval. The shares will be placed with at least six independent professional or institutional investors, none of whom is expected to become a substantial shareholder, and the company will seek listing approval for the new shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, although completion remains subject to conditions and may not proceed, signaling both a move to strengthen its capital base and potential dilution for existing shareholders.

More about TransThera Sciences (Nanjing). Inc.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China with limited liability and listed in Hong Kong, where it trades H shares under stock code 2617. The company operates in the biopharmaceutical sector, focusing on the research, development and commercialization of innovative therapies, primarily targeting healthcare and life sciences markets in China and internationally.

JD Logistics plans to delist its consolidated subsidiary Deppon from the Shanghai Stock Exchange, with its wholly owned subsidiary Suqian Jingdong Zhuofeng, an indirect controlling shareholder of Deppon, proposing a voluntary withdrawal of Deppon’s shares subject to approval at a general meeting and by the Shanghai Stock Exchange. JD Logistics, Inc. is a China-based logistics and supply chain solutions provider listed in Hong Kong, offering integrated warehousing, transportation and delivery services. Through acquisitions such as that of Deppon Group, the company has expanded its presence in less-than-truckload, freight and integrated logistics services across mainland China, strengthening its role in the broader e-commerce and industrial logistics ecosystem.

data.title: Lygend Refines Indonesian Project Structure With New US$505 Million Joint Venture BJL
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Lygend Resources & Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2245) ).

Lygend Resources & Technology has moved to refine the corporate and tax structure of its Indonesian hydrometallurgical slag treatment project through the creation of a new joint venture vehicle, BJL, under a shareholders’ agreement between its connected subsidiary BBS and its wholly owned unit BMS. BJL will have an initial investment of about US$505 million and authorised share capital of IDR1.33 trillion, with BBS holding 99.999925% and BMS 0.000075%, a structure designed chiefly to secure Indonesian tax incentives and reduce the project’s long-term tax burden. As the joint venture involves connected parties aligned with substantial shareholder Ms. Lim, it is treated as a connected transaction under Hong Kong listing rules, though the board stresses that BJL largely mirrors the previously approved BBS framework, representing an implementation refinement rather than a material change to the project’s core economics, governance or overall structure, and is viewed as beneficial to shareholders by optimising future returns from the Indonesian operation.

data.title: Aceso Life Science Warns of Volatility as Regulators Flag Highly Concentrated Shareholding
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Aceso Life Science Group Limited ( (HK:0474) ) has shared an announcement.

Aceso Life Science Group Limited has disclosed, at the request of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and following an enquiry by the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), that as of 31 December 2025 its shareholding was highly concentrated in the hands of a few investors. Three substantial shareholders held 71.94% of issued shares, while 20 other shareholders and their related parties held a further 18.79%, leaving only 9.27% of shares in the hands of other investors, a structure that significantly limits the effective free float. The SFC highlighted that over the period from 10 September to 31 December 2025, Aceso’s share price surged 489%, and by 12 January 2026 was up 521% from its September level, raising concerns that such sharp moves, combined with the tight float, could lead to substantial price volatility. The company has cautioned existing shareholders and prospective investors that even small trades could trigger large price swings, underscoring elevated trading and liquidity risk and the need for extreme caution when dealing in its shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0474) stock is a Sell with a HK$0.12 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aceso Life Science Group Limited stock, see the HK:0474 Stock Forecast page.

More about Aceso Life Science Group Limited

Aceso Life Science Group Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company (Stock Code: 00474) incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability, whose shares are traded on the Main Board of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. The company operates within the life sciences sector, though this announcement focuses specifically on its shareholding structure and trading characteristics rather than its underlying products or services.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging has proposed removing Grant Thornton Hong Kong as its auditor and appointing Rongcheng (Hong Kong) CPA Limited, subject to shareholder approval at an extraordinary general meeting, in order to accelerate completion of its delayed 2024 and 2025 audits and support the planned resumption of trading in its shares. data.title: Raffles Interior Faces Complaint Over Alleged PRC FX Breaches Tied to HK$300 Million Deal
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Raffles Interior Ltd. ( (HK:1376) ) has provided an update.

Raffles Interior Limited has disclosed that it received an anonymous complaint letter sent to Hong Kong regulators and the company, alleging that executive director and controlling shareholder Zheng Nenghuan and related parties may have violated PRC foreign exchange control regulations and improperly transferred domestic PRC assets overseas in connection with a proposed HK$300 million acquisition. The complaint questions the recent intra-group transfer of Shenzhen Jinxu Technology Co., Ltd., which holds land-use rights in mainland China, to the acquisition target vehicle ultimately controlled by Zheng, and highlights an apparent absence of required foreign exchange registration under PRC Circular No. 37, warning that proceeding with the deal without rectifying this could expose the company to regulatory risk in China and potentially harm minority shareholders’ interests.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1376) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Raffles Interior Ltd. stock, see the HK:1376 Stock Forecast page.

More about Raffles Interior Ltd.

The company’s shareholder base includes a controlling shareholder and executive director, Zheng Nenghuan, reflecting a governance structure where related-party transactions and regulatory compliance are closely scrutinised by Hong Kong and PRC authorities.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) has issued an update.

United Company RUSAL has announced the payment of interest on its BO-001P-11 series exchange-traded bonds, issued under its 001R bond programme and listed in Russia. For the sixteenth coupon period, running from 11 December 2025 to 10 January 2026, the company paid a total of RUB 154.4 million, or RUB 15.44 per bond, across 10 million bonds, with the coupon calculated based on the Bank of Russia’s key rate plus a 2.50% annual premium. The timely coupon payment underscores RUSAL’s continued access to domestic debt markets and its use of variable-rate bonds to align funding costs with Russian monetary conditions, which is relevant for bondholders monitoring the company’s credit profile and liquidity management.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is an international public joint-stock company and one of the world’s largest aluminium producers, with its securities listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Moscow Exchange and SPB Exchange. The company operates in the metals and mining industry, focusing on aluminium production and related financial instruments, including exchange-traded bonds issued in the Russian market.

This payment underscores RUSAL’s ongoing fulfilment of its fixed-income obligations, which is relevant for bondholders and signals continued access to domestic capital markets for funding its operations.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is a leading international aluminium producer, engaged in the mining, refining and smelting of aluminium and related products, with its securities listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Moscow Exchange and SPB Exchange, targeting both domestic Russian and global industrial and financial markets.

data.title: RUSAL Pays Seventh Coupon on Yuan-Denominated Exchange-Traded Bonds
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) just unveiled an update.

United Company RUSAL has announced the payment of coupon income on its uncertificated interest-bearing non-convertible exchange-traded bonds series BO-001P-07, denominated in Chinese yuan and issued under its 001P bond programme. For the seventh coupon period, running from 10 October 2025 to 9 January 2026, the company paid a total of 11.71 million yuan on 594,589 bonds and 67.14 million rubles on 305,411 bonds, with some payments made in rubles based on bondholders’ instructions, demonstrating RUSAL’s active engagement in the Russian and yuan bond markets and ongoing servicing of its debt obligations to investors.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is a major international aluminium producer, operating as an international public joint-stock company incorporated in Jersey and continued in the Russian Federation. The company is listed on the Hong Kong, Moscow and SPB exchanges and focuses on the production and sale of aluminium and related products to global industrial and manufacturing customers.
